The world’s biggest sporting spectacle comes to a close with a big celebration at Stade de France.

Sign up now:Get ST's newsletters delivered to your inbox

PublishedAug 12, 2024, 04:10 PM

UpdatedAug 12, 2024, 04:10 PM

French singer Yseult performing at the closing ceremony of the Paris Olympics as fireworks go off above the Stade de France on Aug 11, 2024.

PHOTO: REUTERS

Athletes from various countries mingling during the closing ceremony of the Paris Olympics at the Stade de France on Aug 11, 2024.

PHOTO: REUTERS

French athletes enjoying a playful moment during the closing ceremony of the Paris Olympics at the Stade de France on Aug 11, 2024.

PHOTO: REUTERS

Bulgarian athletes waving to spectators at the closing ceremony of the Paris Olympics at the Stade de France on Aug 11, 2024.

PHOTO: REUTERS

French swimmer Leon Marchand carrying a lantern containing the Olympic flame during the closing ceremony of the Paris Olympics at the Stade de France on Aug 11, 2024.

PHOTO: AFP

US actor Tom Cruise riding a motorbike with the Olympic flag during the closing ceremony of the Paris Olympics at the Stade de France on Aug 11, 2024.

PHOTO: REUTERS

Performers onstage during the closing ceremony of the Paris Olympics at the Stade de France on Aug 11, 2024.

PHOTO: REUTERS

French band Phoenix performing during the closing ceremony of the Paris Olympics at the Stade de France on Aug 11, 2024.

PHOTO: REUTERS

US singer H.E.R performing during the closing ceremony of the Paris Olympics at the Stade de France on Aug 11, 2024.

PHOTO: AFP

Swiss pianist Alain Roche playing on a suspended piano as part of his performance during the closing ceremony of the Paris Olympics at the Stade de France on Aug 11, 2024.

PHOTO: REUTERS

The "Golden Voyager", a character inspired by a number of references from France's historical heritage, performing during the closing ceremony of the Paris Olympics at the Stade de France on Aug 11, 2024.

PHOTO: REUTERS

Athletes watching the closing ceremony of the Paris Olympics at the Stade de France on Aug 11, 2024.
